response: As of June 2024, Tom Hanks has several projects in the works. He is set to star in the film "No Better Place to Die," a World War II drama. Additionally, he is involved in the adaptation of the novel "A Man Called Ove" (retitled "A Man Called Otto"), which was released in 2022. Hanks is also known for his ongoing work as a producer and writer, and he frequently collaborates with his production company, Playtone, on various film and television projects. For the most up-to-date information, it's best to check recent entertainment news sources, as new projects may be announced.
